description:
Create a new security incident in EventLog Analyzer's Incident Management module with the following details:
- Title: 'Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts'
- Priority: High
- Status: Open
- Description: 'Multiple failed authentication attempts detected from 10.0.2.15 targeting service accounts svc_backup and svc_deploy.'
- Assignee: admin

Ensure the incident is saved and visible in the incident list.

metadata.expected_title: Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts
